scripts.frontend:verify: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @argus/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @argus/web test && pnpm --filter @argus/web build && node scripts/verify-web-pwa-build.mjs && node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const pkg = require('./apps/web/package.json'); if (!pkg.scripts?.['test:e2e']) { console.log('Skipping @argus/web test:e2e until Step 3 adds it.'); process.exit(0); } const result = spawnSync('pnpm', ['--filter', '@argus/web', 'test:e2e'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: process.platform === 'win32' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.comment:prepare: build:packages emits packages/*/dist so consumers (apps/web) can typecheck against the libs' .d.ts — CI typechecks before building and dist is gitignored.
scripts.prepare: lefthook install || true && pnpm run build:packages
